TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-hunting2_Buyung
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ralu'mu ga Buyung na Siyat.
S.PHON: raluʔmu ɣa βujuŋ na s~ɕijat.
S.FORM: ralu'mu ga Buyung na Siyat.
S.PHON: raluʔmu ɣa βujuŋ na s~ɕijat.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字叫Buyung na Siyat.
My name is Buyung na Siyat.

S.FORM: aring sku ulaqi' kuwing ga tiku vaqunmu ga a miru' kuwing su tataykay na' ga.
S.PHON: ariŋ s~ɕku ulaqiʔ kuwiŋ ɣa tiku *aqunmu ɣa a miruʔ kuwiŋ s~ɕu tatajkaj naʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: aring sku ulaqi' kuwing ga tiku vaqunmu ga a miru' kuwing su tataykay na' ga.
S.PHON: ariŋ s~ɕku ulaqiʔ kuwiŋ ɣa tiku *aqunmu ɣa a miruʔ kuwiŋ s~ɕu tatajkaj naʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 當我是孩子,開始有意識,童年開始讀書的時候.
Since I was a child, when I knew things, when I studied in my childhood.

S.FORM: mamaspat kung su kaal la ga rasun kung ni yava'mu musa' i ragiyax qumaluwap.
S.PHON: mamas~ɕpat kuŋ s~ɕu kaal la ɣa ras~ɕun kuŋ ni ja*aʔmu mus~ɕaʔ i raɣijax qumaluwap.
S.FORM: mamaspat kung su kaal la ga rasun kung ni yava'mu musa' i ragiyax qumaluwap.
S.PHON: mamas~ɕpat kuŋ s~ɕu kaal la ɣa ras~ɕun kuŋ ni ja*aʔmu mus~ɕaʔ i raɣijax qumaluwap.
S.TRANSL: 我八歲的時候,我的爸爸帶我去山上打獵.
When I was eight years old, my father brought me to hunt in the mountain.

S.FORM: gumlung su nabakis gumlung su nabakis talanmu ru mitaal su vawwak.
S.PHON: ɣumluŋ s~ɕu naβakis~ɕ ɣumluŋ s~ɕu naβakis~ɕ talanmu ru mitaal s~ɕu *awwak.
S.FORM: gumlung su nabakis gumlung su nabakis talanmu ru mitaal su vawwak.
S.PHON: ɣumluŋ s~ɕu naβakis~ɕ ɣumluŋ s~ɕu naβakis~ɕ talanmu ru mitaal s~ɕu *awwak.
S.TRANSL: 我跟著老人們,然後我看看…我看到山豬.
I followed the old people, and let me see…I saw boarss.

S.FORM: ru vahagun nha' ru qaluwapun nha' ru havun nha' la.
S.PHON: ru *aħaɣun nħaʔ ru qaluwapun nħaʔ ru ħa*un nħaʔ la.
S.FORM: ru vahagun nha' ru qaluwapun nha' ru havun nha' la.
S.PHON: ru *aħaɣun nħaʔ ru qaluwapun nħaʔ ru ħa*un nħaʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 然後,他們追山豬、抓到它並把它刺死.
Then, they chased the hog, caught it, and stabbed it.

S.FORM: havun nha' ku vawwak la ga hala pk sipalawa'niya' maha uwah la.
S.PHON: ħa*un nħaʔ ku *awwak la ɣa ħala pk s~ɕipalawaʔnijaʔ maħa uwaħ la.
S.FORM: havun nha' ku vawwak la ga hala pk sipalawa'niya' maha uwah la.
S.PHON: ħa*un nħaʔ ku *awwak la ɣa ħala pk s~ɕipalawaʔnijaʔ maħa uwaħ la.
S.TRANSL: 他刺到山豬後,他就叫大家過來.
After stabbing the hog, he beckoned everyone to come.

S.FORM: havunmu ku vawwak la uwah rumag mapanga'.
S.PHON: ħa*unmu ku *awwak la uwaħ rumaɣ mapaŋaʔ.
S.FORM: havunmu ku vawwak la uwah rumag mapanga'.
S.PHON: ħa*unmu ku *awwak la uwaħ rumaɣ mapaŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我刺到山豬了,來幫我抬山豬.
I stabbed the hog; come and help carry it.

S.FORM: sipanga' nha' ru gawng la ga as sayukan mian la.
S.PHON: s~ɕipaŋaʔ nħaʔ ru ɣawŋ la ɣa as~ɕ s~ɕajukan mian la.
S.FORM: sipanga' nha' ru gawng la ga as sayukan mian la.
S.PHON: s~ɕipaŋaʔ nħaʔ ru ɣawŋ la ɣa as~ɕ s~ɕajukan mian la.
S.TRANSL: 把山豬背到河邊時,我們燒山豬的毛.
When we carried the pig to the river, we burned the fur.

S.FORM: sayukan nha' la ru naqaru' sumayuk la ga a hawvingun nha' la ru qasungun nha'.
S.PHON: s~ɕajukan nħaʔ la ru naqaruʔ s~ɕumajuk la ɣa a ħaw*iŋun nħaʔ la ru qas~ɕuŋun nħaʔ.
S.FORM: sayukan nha' la ru naqaru' sumayuk la ga a hawvingun nha' la ru qasungun nha'.
S.PHON: s~ɕajukan nħaʔ la ru naqaruʔ s~ɕumajuk la ɣa a ħaw*iŋun nħaʔ la ru qas~ɕuŋun nħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們燒毛,結束燒毛之後,他們切肉並分肉.
They burned the fur; after finishing burning the fur, they cut and divided the meat.

S.FORM: ru taqaru' sami maniq ga musa' sami lawwi su qutux ragiyax ru musa' i musa' sami tatak la maki sami tatak la ru.
S.PHON: ru taqaruʔ s~ɕami maniq ɣa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami lawwi s~ɕu qutux raɣijax ru mus~ɕaʔ i mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami tatak la maki s~ɕami tatak la ru.
S.FORM: ru taqaru' sami maniq ga musa' sami lawwi su qutux ragiyax ru musa' i musa' sami tatak la maki sami tatak la ru.
S.PHON: ru taqaruʔ s~ɕami maniq ɣa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami lawwi s~ɕu qutux raɣijax ru mus~ɕaʔ i mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami tatak la maki s~ɕami tatak la ru.
S.TRANSL: 然後,結束吃肉以後,我們再去一座山…一個獵寮,去一個獵寮.
Then, finishing eating, again we went to one mountain- a hunting house… to a hunting house.

S.FORM: tiku nanabakismiyan ga yava'miyan yutasmiyan ru' mama'miyan musa' qumbuwang su yapit la musa' qumbuwang su yapit la ru.
S.PHON: tiku nanaβakis~ɕmijan ɣa ja*aʔmijan jutas~ɕmijan ruʔ mamaʔmijan mus~ɕaʔ qumβuwaŋ s~ɕu japit la mus~ɕaʔ qumβuwaŋ s~ɕu japit la ru.
S.FORM: tiku nanabakismiyan ga yava'miyan yutasmiyan ru' mama'miyan musa' qumbuwang su yapit la musa' qumbuwang su yapit la ru.
S.PHON: tiku nanaβakis~ɕmijan ɣa ja*aʔmijan jutas~ɕmijan ruʔ mamaʔmijan mus~ɕaʔ qumβuwaŋ s~ɕu japit la mus~ɕaʔ qumβuwaŋ s~ɕu japit la ru.
S.TRANSL: 這個…我們的老人們,我們的爸爸爺爺叔伯們,躲在樹叢中找飛鼠…一面躲著一面找飛鼠.
Well, our elders- our father, grandfather, and uncles, hid in the bush to look for flying squirrels.

S.FORM: e kiya ku vaq s i mru' ga niya maras su saying ku sinbu' nha' ka yapit.
S.PHON: e kija ku *aq s~ɕ i mruʔ ɣa nija maras~ɕ s~ɕu s~ɕajiŋ ku s~ɕinβuʔ nħaʔ ka japit.
S.FORM: e kiya ku vaq s i mru' ga niya maras su saying ku sinbu' nha' ka yapit.
S.PHON: e kija ku *aq s~ɕ i mruʔ ɣa nija maras~ɕ s~ɕu s~ɕajiŋ ku s~ɕinβuʔ nħaʔ ka japit.
S.TRANSL: 有射很準的人,會帶兩隻他們射到的飛鼠.
For those who shoot well, they will bring two flying squirrels.

S.FORM: s kiya ku ini' qavaq ga ini' sbu' ga anya asi pqabaqava' ru muwah tatak.
S.PHON: s~ɕ kija ku iniʔ qa*aq ɣa iniʔ s~ɕβuʔ ɣa anja as~ɕi pqaβaqa*aʔ ru muwaħ tatak.
S.FORM: s kiya ku ini' qavaq ga ini' sbu' ga anya asi pqabaqava' ru muwah tatak.
S.PHON: s~ɕ kija ku iniʔ qa*aq ɣa iniʔ s~ɕβuʔ ɣa anja as~ɕi pqaβaqa*aʔ ru muwaħ tatak.
S.TRANSL: 有射不準,或沒有射到的人,他們會兩手空空回來獵寮.
For those who don't shoot well or didn't shoot anything, they came back to the hunting house bare-handed.

S.FORM: ru m mapatisan ru manuvuag su quwaw la ru taihuk i ska' mahngan la ga maqilaap la.
S.PHON: ru m mapatis~ɕan ru manu*uaɣ s~ɕu quwaw la ru taiħuk i s~ɕkaʔ maħŋan la ɣa maqilaap la.
S.FORM: ru m mapatisan ru manuvuag su quwaw la ru taihuk i ska' mahngan la ga maqilaap la.
S.PHON: ru m mapatis~ɕan ru manu*uaɣ s~ɕu quwaw la ru taiħuk i s~ɕkaʔ maħŋan la ɣa maqilaap la.
S.TRANSL: 然後,我們互相聊天、喝酒到半夜、然後睡覺.
Then, we chatted with each other and drank wine until the middle of the night; and then we slept.

S.FORM: ru kinsasan saluan ga tutulun sami naku navakis maha tutul la halayta' magaboq qumuvuwang lawwi.
S.PHON: ru kins~ɕas~ɕan s~ɕaluan ɣa tutulun s~ɕami naku na*akis~ɕ maħa tutul la ħalajtaʔ maɣaβoq qumu*uwaŋ lawwi.
S.FORM: ru kinsasan saluan ga tutulun sami naku navakis maha tutul la halayta' magaboq qumuvuwang lawwi.
S.PHON: ru kins~ɕas~ɕan s~ɕaluan ɣa tutulun s~ɕami naku na*akis~ɕ maħa tutul la ħalajtaʔ maɣaβoq qumu*uwaŋ lawwi.
S.TRANSL: 然後,第二天早上,老人叫醒我們說醒來、我們提早去打獵.
Then, the morning on the second day, the elder woke us and said wake up- we hurry go hunting.

S.FORM: ru mtutul sami kahavaw la ga magagaang sami gi musa' i qumavuwang lawwi su e yapit vahut hoN tikuxi'.
S.PHON: ru mtutul s~ɕami kaħa*aw la ɣa maɣaɣaaŋ s~ɕami ɣi mus~ɕaʔ i quma*uwaŋ lawwi s~ɕu e japit *aħut ħon tikuxiʔ.
S.FORM: ru mtutul sami kahavaw la ga magagaang sami gi musa' i qumavuwang lawwi su e yapit vahut hoN tikuxi'.
S.PHON: ru mtutul s~ɕami kaħa*aw la ɣa maɣaɣaaŋ s~ɕami ɣi mus~ɕaʔ i quma*uwaŋ lawwi s~ɕu e japit *aħut ħon tikuxiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我們全部醒來後,我們分散因為要再去獵飛鼠、松鼠、和竹雞.
After we all woke up, we separated because we went hunting again for flying squirrels, squirrels, and pheasants.

S.FORM: kya ku ruma' ga niyan sunbu' ga maras su tiku saying yapit qutux ku qavahaniq qutux ku vahut.
S.PHON: kja ku rumaʔ ɣa nijan s~ɕunβuʔ ɣa maras~ɕ s~ɕu tiku s~ɕajiŋ japit qutux ku qa*aħaniq qutux ku *aħut.
S.FORM: kya ku ruma' ga niyan sunbu' ga maras su tiku saying yapit qutux ku qavahaniq qutux ku vahut.
S.PHON: kja ku rumaʔ ɣa nijan s~ɕunβuʔ ɣa maras~ɕ s~ɕu tiku s~ɕajiŋ japit qutux ku qa*aħaniq qutux ku *aħut.
S.TRANSL: 有一些人有射到東西,會帶回一隻竹雞、兩隻飛鼠、一隻鳥和一隻松鼠.
There are some who shot something and they would bring one pheasant, two flying squirrels, one bird, and one squirrel.

S.FORM: ru taihuk tatak ru l la squnun nha' la ga payux sinvu' nha' la ga manananak na qasinu.
S.PHON: ru taiħuk tatak ru l la s~ɕqunun nħaʔ la ɣa pajux s~ɕin*uʔ nħaʔ la ɣa manananak na qas~ɕinu.
S.FORM: ru taihuk tatak ru l la squnun nha' la ga payux sinvu' nha' la ga manananak na qasinu.
S.PHON: ru taiħuk tatak ru l la s~ɕqunun nħaʔ la ɣa pajux s~ɕin*uʔ nħaʔ la ɣa manananak na qas~ɕinu.
S.TRANSL: 然後到達獵寮之後,他們把獵物放在一起,很多獵物放在一起會變成很多很奇怪的動物.
Then arriving the hunting house, they put their trophies together; many trophies put together seemed to be many strange beasts.

S.FORM: ru maqassami kahabaw maha maqariyatta' la.
S.PHON: ru maqas~ɕs~ɕami kaħaβaw maħa maqarijattaʔ la.
S.FORM: ru maqassami kahabaw maha maqariyatta' la.
S.PHON: ru maqas~ɕs~ɕami kaħaβaw maħa maqarijattaʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 我們很高興並說我們很幸運.
We were all glad and we said that we were lucky.

S.FORM: musa'ta' i imu la ga musa' kiya ku si'arasta' suku ul'ulaqi'ta' imuwag ru naki nha' pakasun.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔtaʔ i imu la ɣa mus~ɕaʔ kija ku s~ɕiʔaras~ɕtaʔ s~ɕuku ulʔulaqiʔtaʔ imuwaɣ ru naki nħaʔ pakas~ɕun.
S.FORM: musa'ta' i imu la ga musa' kiya ku si'arasta' suku ul'ulaqi'ta' imuwag ru naki nha' pakasun.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔtaʔ i imu la ɣa mus~ɕaʔ kija ku s~ɕiʔaras~ɕtaʔ s~ɕuku ulʔulaqiʔtaʔ imuwaɣ ru naki nħaʔ pakas~ɕun.
S.TRANSL: 我們回家,有帶東西給小孩他們才會高興.
After we went home, we brought our children things, so that they would be happy.

S.FORM: maha siki runi la.
S.PHON: maħa s~ɕiki runi la.
S.FORM: maha siki runi la.
S.PHON: maħa s~ɕiki runi la.
